Studiesteder | UiT

https://uit.no/studiesteder
Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 465
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">www.forsvaret.no<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyCont
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button"><div>www.mcb.uu.se<br/>www.uu.se<br/></div><div class="CybotCo
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)

2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="nav-link studenter-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For studenter']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For studenter <i aria-hidden="true" class=
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="nav-link ansatte-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For ansatte']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For ansatte <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas f
Add href attribute or use a button element

Link opens in new window without indication

2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="nav-link studenter-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For studenter']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For studenter <i aria-hidden="true" class=
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="nav-link ansatte-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For ansatte']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For ansatte <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas f
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

  • with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

    <li class="tocify-item tocify-item-topp" data-unique="topp" onclick="scrollToTop()" style="cursor: pointer;" title="Hopp til toppen av siden"><a> Til toppen </a></li>
    Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
    • 2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

    Add a skip link at the start of the page: Hopp til hovedinnhold

    2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
    SERIOUS

    Page is missing h1 heading

    <body style="padding-top: 0px;" tabindex="0"><div aria-labelledby="CybotCookiebotDialogBodyContentTitle" aria-modal="true" class="CybotEdge CybotMultilevel CybotCookiebotDialogActive" data-template="s
    Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
    1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    First heading is h2, should start with h1

    <h2 style="font-size:1.6em !important">Få mer ut av studietiden din</h2>
    Start your heading structure with h1
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

    <h4 style="margin-top:10px">Støre ga Mohnprisen til kanadisk forsker</h4>
    Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

    <h4 class="event-tittel">SAMISK UKE PÅ MUSEET // SAMI WEEK AT THE MUSEUM</h4>
    Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

    Page has no main landmark

    <body>
    Add
    element or role='main' to wrap primary content

    Link opens in new window without indication

    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button"><div>www.mcb.uu.se<br/>www.uu.se<br/></div><div class="CybotCo
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
    Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

    Add href attribute or use a button element

    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

    <a class="nav-link ansatte-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For ansatte']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For ansatte <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas f
    Add href attribute or use a button element

    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button"><div>www.mcb.uu.se<br/>www.uu.se<br/></div><div class="CybotCo
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
    Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

    2.1.1 Tastatur (7 avvik)
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

    <a class="nav-link studenter-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For studenter']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For studenter <i aria-hidden="true" class=
    Add href attribute or use a button element
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

    <a class="nav-link ansatte-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For ansatte']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For ansatte <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas f
    Add href attribute or use a button element
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    SERIOUS

    Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

    <input id="v_bk" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Tracking av kategoribruk i mikroemnekatalog', 'Filtrer på kategori', 'Bærekraft']);" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value=".bk"/>
    Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)

    <ul> <li>Steg 2: <strong>Søk om opptak</strong> – Mikroemner er en type enkeltemner ved UiT. Det som gjør mikroemner spesielle er at de alle er 2,5 studiepoeng, alle er hel-digitale og alle kan tas nå
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

    MODERATE

    <ul> <li>Du kan semesterregistrere deg i disse periodene:</li> <ul> <li>For høstsemesteret fra 15. juni til 1. september.</li> <li>For vårsemseteret fra 15. desember til 1. februar.</li> </ul> </ul>

    Link opens in new window without indication

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>

    2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">www.forsvaret.no<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyCont
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button"><div>www.mcb.uu.se<br/>www.uu.se<br/></div><div class="CybotCo
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
    Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
    2.1.1 Tastatur (24 avvik)
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

    Add href attribute or use a button element

    UiT fleksibel utdanning | UiT

    https://uit.no/utdanning/fleksibel
    Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 692
    1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
    Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Image is missing alt attribute

    <img class="w-100" src="/Content/875829/cache=1741774481000/ilp.jpg"/>
    Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
    Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Image is missing alt attribute

    <img class="w-100" src="/Content/875828/cache=1741774494000/rkbu.jpg"/>
    Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
    2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">www.forsvaret.no<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyCont
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button"><div>www.mcb.uu.se<br/>www.uu.se<br/></div><div class="CybotCo
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
    Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://uit.no/utdanning/videreutdanning/ilp#modal_658964" style="text-decoration:underline" target="_blank">tidligere nyhetsbrev her</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
    Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
    MODERATE

    Personal data field 'p_email' missing autocomplete attribute

    <input class="email required" id="p_email" maxlength="200" name="p_email" size="35" type="email" value=""/>
    Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
    2.1.1 Tastatur (21 avvik)
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)

    Add href attribute or use a button element

    Beredskap: Varsling til nødnummer | UiT

    https://uit.no/om/beredskap
    Avvik: 65 | Bestått: 476
    2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
    SERIOUS

    Page is missing h1 heading

    <body style="padding-top: 0px;" tabindex="0"><div aria-labelledby="CybotCookiebotDialogBodyContentTitle" aria-modal="true" class="CybotEdge CybotMultilevel CybotCookiebotDialogActive" data-template="s
    Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
    1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    First heading is h2, should start with h1

    <h2>Varsling til nødnummer</h2>
    Start your heading structure with h1
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Page has 3 main landmarks (should have 1)

    <main>
    Use only one
    element per page
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    List contains non-li elements: ['span']

    <ul class="nav flex-column"> <li><a class="nav-link" href="https://uit.no/utdanning" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'Studier']);" tabindex="0">Studier</a></li> <li><a class
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    List contains non-li elements: ['br', 'br', 'br']

    <ul class="ansatteinnhold flex-column maxheight"> <li><span class="nav-link tittelniva">For ansatte</span></li> <li><a class="nav-link" href="https://uit.no/intranett" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hov
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    List contains non-li elements: ['ul', 'ul']

    <ol> <li>Ringe aktuelt nødnummer:</li> <ul> <li>Brannvesen: 110</li> <li>Politi: 112</li> <li>Ambulanse: 113</li> </ul> <li>Varsle UiT internt via døgnkontinuerlig varslingsnummer:</li> <ul> <li>776 4
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    List contains non-li elements: ['ul', 'ul']

    <ol> <li>Relevant emergency number:</li> <ul> <li>Fire: 110</li> <li>Police: 112</li> <li>Ambulance: 113 </li> </ul> <li>24-hour emergency number at UiT:</li> <ul> <li>+47 776 44444</li> </ul> </ol>
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
    2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">www.forsvaret.no<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyCont
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button"><div>www.mcb.uu.se<br/>www.uu.se<br/></div><div class="CybotCo
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
    Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL

    <a href="http://www.kriseinfo.no" target="_blank">www.kriseinfo.no<br/></a>
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="http://www.kriseinfo.no" target="_blank">www.kriseinfo.no<br/></a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.sikresiden.no/voldssituasjoner" target="_blank" title="PLIVO lenke">Pågående livstruende vold (PLIVO)</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication

    <a href="https://www.sikresiden.no/en/violentsituations" target="_blank" title="Open PLIVO link">Acute and life-threatening violece (PLIVO) </a>

    2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

    <a class="nav-link studenter-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For studenter']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For studenter <i aria-hidden="true" class=
    Add href attribute or use a button element
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

    <a class="nav-link ansatte-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For ansatte']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For ansatte <i aria-hidden="true" class="fas f
    Add href attribute or use a button element

    Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Add a skip link at the start of the page: Hopp til hovedinnhold

    Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (3 pages scanned)

    [ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 3 pages]
    Avvik: 12 | Bestått: 0
    1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Heading level skipped: h1 to h3 (×2 across article pages)

    <h3>Å forme framtiden</h3>
    Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Page has 3 main landmarks (should have 1) (×1 across article pages)

    <main>
    Use only one
    element per page
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    List contains non-li elements: ['span'] (×3 across article pages)

    <ul class="nav flex-column"> <li><a class="nav-link" href="https://uit.no/utdanning" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'Studier']);" tabindex="0">Studier</a></li> <li><a class
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    List contains non-li elements: ['br', 'br', 'br'] (×3 across article pages)

    <ul class="ansatteinnhold flex-column maxheight"> <li><span class="nav-link tittelniva">For ansatte</span></li> <li><a class="nav-link" href="https://uit.no/intranett" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hov
    List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
    Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×2 across article pages)

    <nav class="head-main"> <div class="navbar navbar-dark box-shadow"> <div class="container d-flex justify-content-between"> <a class="navbar-brand d-flex align-items-center" href="/"> <span class="sr-o
    Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
    2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link text is a URL (×6 across article pages)

    <a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">www.forsvaret.no<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyCont
    Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Link opens in new window without indication (×4 across article pages)

    <a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a>
    Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold' (×3 across article pages)

    <a class="sr-only sr-only-focusable" href="#maincontents" id="skip">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
    Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
    Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
    MINOR

    Link text is very long (869 characters) (×1 across article pages)

    <a class="boxlink" href="https://uit.no/go/target/918623"> <div class="calicon"> <div class="month"> <span class="dato">apr</span> </div> <div class="day"> <span class="dato">07</span> </div> </div> <
    Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
    2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
    Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
    CRITICAL

    Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible (×6 across article pages)

    <a class="nav-link studenter-link" onclick="_sz.push(['event', 'Hovedmeny', 'Klikk på lenke', 'For studenter']);" onkeydown="handleEnter(event)" tabindex="0">For studenter <i aria-hidden="true" class=
    Add href attribute or use a button element
    2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
    Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
    MODERATE

    Page has no skip link to bypass navigation (×3 across article pages)

    <body>
    Add a skip link at the start of the page: Hopp til hovedinnhold

    Kopier kommandoen:

    python checker.py https://uit.no --max-pages 19 --format html
